Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
print\('=== Attributes ==='\)
for a in data.get\('attr', {}\).get\('values', []\):
    print\(f'  {a[\\"id\\"]}: {a[\\"value\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Combat Techniques ==='\)
for k,v in data.get\('ct', {}\).items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Items \(weapons/shields\) ==='\)
items = data.get\('belongings', {}\).get\('items', {}\)
for k,v in items.items\(\):
    if isinstance\(v, dict\) and v.get\('gr'\) in [1,2]:
        print\(f'  {v.get\(\\"name\\"\)} gr={v.get\(\\"gr\\"\)} ct={v.get\(\\"combatTechnique\\"\)} at={v.get\(\\"at\\"\)} pa={v.get\(\\"pa\\"\)} reach={v.get\(\\"reach\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, sqlite3

db = sqlite3.connect\('Hesindion/Resources/rules.db'\)
c = db.cursor\(\)

with open\('docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

activatables = data.get\('activatable', {}\)
for k, v in sorted\(activatables.items\(\)\):
    c.execute\('SELECT i.name FROM rules_i18n i WHERE i.rule_id = ? AND i.locale = ?', \(k, 'de-DE'\)\)
    row = c.fetchone\(\)
    name = row[0] if row else '?'
    print\(f'{k} \({name}\): {v}'\)

db.close\(\)
")

import json

# Read the first part of the JSON file
with open\('/Users/SamuelvonBaussnern/proj/50_priv/iDSACompanion/docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json', 'r'\) as f:
    try:
        data = json.load\(f\)
        # Print the top-level keys and relevant values
        print\("Top-level keys:", list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
        print\("\\nr:", data.get\('r'\)\)
        print\("c:", data.get\('c'\)\)
        print\("p:", data.get\('p'\)\)
        print\("rv:", data.get\('rv'\)\)
        print\("\\nPersonalData section:", json.dumps\(data.get\('pers'\), indent=2\)[:500]\)
    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
        print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, glob
for f in glob.glob\('docs/sample_heros/*.json'\):
    with open\(f\) as fh:
        d = json.load\(fh\)
        print\(f.split\('/'\)[-1]\)
        print\(f'  r={d.get\(\\"r\\"\)}, rv={d.get\(\\"rv\\"\)}, c={d.get\(\\"c\\"\)}, p={d.get\(\\"p\\"\)}'\)
        pn = d.get\('professionName'\) or d.get\('profession_name'\)
        print\(f'  professionName={pn}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

file_path = "/Users/SamuelvonBaussnern/proj/50_priv/iDSACompanion/docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json"

with open\(file_path, 'r'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

print\("\\n=== PETS ==="\)
pets = data.get\('pets', {}\)
for pet_id, pet_data in pets.items\(\):
    print\(f"\\nPet ID: {pet_id}"\)
    for key, value in sorted\(pet_data.items\(\)\):
        if key != 'id':
            print\(f"  {key}: {value}"\)

print\("\\n=== PERSONAL DATA \(pers\) ==="\)
pers = data.get\('pers', {}\)
for key, value in sorted\(pers.items\(\)\):
    if isinstance\(value, dict\):
        print\(f"\\n{key}:"\)
        for k2, v2 in sorted\(value.items\(\)\):
            print\(f"  {k2}: {v2}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"{key}: {value}"\)

print\("\\n=== EXPERIENCE \(ap\) ==="\)
ap = data.get\('ap', {}\)
for key, value in sorted\(ap.items\(\)\):
    print\(f"  {key}: {value}"\)

print\("\\n=== ALL TALENTS ==="\)
talents = data.get\('talents', {}\)
print\(f"Total: {len\(talents\)}"\)
for tal_id in sorted\(talents.keys\(\)\):
    print\(f"  {tal_id}: {talents[tal_id]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

file_path = "/Users/SamuelvonBaussnern/proj/50_priv/iDSACompanion/docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json"

with open\(file_path, 'r'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Extract rules section which might have name mappings
rules = data.get\('rules', {}\)
print\("RULES SECTION \(metadata\):"\)
for key, value in rules.items\(\):
    print\(f"  {key}: {value}"\)

# Check for localization or name data
print\("\\n\\nAll non-technical top-level fields:"\)
print\(f"  clientVersion: {data.get\('clientVersion'\)}"\)
print\(f"  dateCreated: {data.get\('dateCreated'\)}"\)
print\(f"  dateModified: {data.get\('dateModified'\)}"\)
print\(f"  id: {data.get\('id'\)}"\)
print\(f"  phase: {data.get\('phase'\)}"\)
print\(f"  locale: {data.get\('locale'\)}"\)
print\(f"  name: {data.get\('name'\)}"\)
print\(f"  sex: {data.get\('sex'\)}"\)

# Look for experience data
print\("\\nEXPERIENCE DATA:"\)
exp = data.get\('ap', {}\)
for key, value in exp.items\(\):
    print\(f"  {key}: {value}"\)

print\("\\nPERSONAL DATA \(pers\):"\)
pers = data.get\('pers', {}\)
for key, value in pers.items\(\):
    if not isinstance\(value, dict\):
        print\(f"  {key}: {value}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  {key}: \(dict with {len\(value\)} items\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
with open\("/Users/SamuelvonBaussnern/proj/50_priv/iDSACompanion/docs/sample_heros/Boronmir Siebenfeld von Greifenfurt.json"\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
    activatable = data.get\("activatable", {}\)
    for rid, details in sorted\(activatable.items\(\)\):
        tier = details.get\("tier"\)
        levels = details.get\("levels", []\)
        print\(f"{rid:15} tier={tier} levels={levels}"\)
